title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'security_sensitive' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'security_sensitive' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Spoke/advisors/security_sensitive/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/security_sensitive/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load security_sensitive's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform security_sensitive's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Spoke/advisors/security_sensitive/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
5. Set last_run_at=2026-06-16T11:40:07.808314Z in WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json (entry advisor_id=security_sensitive) AND WAI-Spoke/advisors/security_sensitive/scan_state.json.
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Spoke/advisors/security_sensitive/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'security_sensitive'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.
completion_notes: security_sensitive advisor scan completed. Findings recorded: 4 findings in findings-log.jsonl (1 actionable: NEXTAUTH_URL misconfiguration signal pending verification). Created haiku task lug haiku-verify-nextauth-config-security_sensitive for verification and documentation. Updated schedule-index.json with last_run_at=2026-06-16T11:40:07.808314Z and next_recommended_run=2026-06-23T11:40:07.808314Z. Updated scan_state.json status to active. Advisor is now warm and current.
